seoTitle: Tilba Tilba vs Tilligerry Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tilba Tilba and Tilligerry Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tilba Tilba vs Tilligerry Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tilba Tilba and Tilligerry Creek.
heading: Tilba Tilba vs Tilligerry Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tilba Tilba, New South Wales and Tilligerry Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tilba Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Tilligerry Creek (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tilba Tilba or Tilligerry Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tilba Tilba has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Tilligerry Creek scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tilba Tilba scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Tilligerry Creek scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tilba Tilba or Tilligerry Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tilba Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
